title: Senior Teacher - Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises:
Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises!
